name: test-app
comment_durable-functions: This app is wired to the PUBLISHED durable-functions package so the suite is runnable without an in-repo build. To test against an in-repo build of the Azure Functions durable package instead, change the durable-functions dependency below to a file: reference (e.g. file:../../../packages/azure-functions-durable) once that package exists on your branch, then re-run npm install.

scripts.prestart: npm run clean && npm run build
